sqlMap.select: SELECT RESULT RESULT2 RESULT3 RESULT4 FROM TBL_Board_TreeCache WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND QUERY = #v_PQUERY#

select.isEqual:
(SELECT CONCAT(A.BOARDID, '|', A.ACCESS_, ';') as BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage A INNER JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.ACCESSID = #v_PACCESSID# AND A.PARENTBOARDID = #v_PROOTBOARDID# AND (TRIM(B.companyid) = '' OR B.companyid IS NULL) AND (A.TYPE <> 'GROUP' OR A.TYPE IS NULL)
AND BoardGroupACL = 'Y'
)
UNION
(SELECT CONCAT(C.BOARDID, '|', C.ACCESS_, ';') as BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage C LEFT JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo D ON C.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND C.BoardID = D.BoardID
INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST PGL ON C.TENANT_ID = PGL.TENANT_ID AND C.ACCESSID = PGL.GROUP_ID INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO PGI ON PGL.TENANT_ID = PGI.TENANT_ID AND PGL.GROUP_ID = PGI.GROUP_ID
WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PGI.MEMBER_ID = #v_PACCESSID# AND C.PARENTBOARDID = #v_PROOTBOARDID# AND (TRIM(D.companyid) = '' OR D.companyid IS NULL) AND C.TYPE = 'GROUP'
AND PGI.SUB_DEPT_YN = 'Y'
)
select.isNotEqual:
(SELECT CONCAT(BOARDID, '|', ACCESS_, ';') BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ACCESSID = #v_PACCESSID# AND PARENTBOARDID = #v_PROOTBOARDID# AND (TYPE <> 'GROUP' OR TYPE IS NULL)
AND BoardGroupACL = 'Y'
)
UNION
(SELECT CONCAT(C.BOARDID, '|', C.ACCESS_, ';') as BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage C LEFT JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo D ON C.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND C.BoardID = D.BoardID
INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST PGL ON C.TENANT_ID = PGL.TENANT_ID AND C.ACCESSID = PGL.GROUP_ID INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO PGI ON PGL.TENANT_ID = PGI.TENANT_ID AND PGL.GROUP_ID = PGI.GROUP_ID
WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PGI.MEMBER_ID = #v_PACCESSID# AND C.PARENTBOARDID = #v_PROOTBOARDID# AND C.TYPE = 'GROUP'
AND PGI.SUB_DEPT_YN = 'Y'
)

sqlMap.select: SELECT TREEID , USERID , TREENAME , TREENAME2 , TREENAME3 , TREENAME4 , TREELEVEL , TREESTEP , TREEUPPER , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_MyTree WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TREEUPPER = A.TREEID AND (TREEBOARDID IN (SELECT I1.BOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I1 WHERE I1.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (I1.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(I1.companyid) = '' OR I1.companyid IS NULL) ) OR (TRIM(TREEBOARDID) = '' OR TREEBOARDID IS NULL) ) ) CHILDCNT, TREEBOARDID FROM TBL_Board_MyTree A WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND ( USERID = #v_PUSERID# OR USERID = 'everyone' ) AND TREEUPPER = #v_PTREEUPPER# AND (EXISTS (SELECT I2.BOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I2 WHERE A.TREEBOARDID = I2.BOARDID AND I2.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (I2.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(I2.companyid) = '' OR I2.companyid IS NULL) ) OR (TRIM(TREEBOARDID) = '' OR TREEBOARDID IS NULL) ) ORDER BY TREESTEP ASC

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID , A.BoardName , CASE WHEN (A.Boardname2 = '' OR A.Boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname2 END BoardName2, CASE WHEN (A.Boardname3 = '' OR A.Boardname3 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname3 END BoardName3, CASE WHEN (A.Boardname4 = '' OR A.Boardname4 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname4 END BoardName4, A.TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor, A.Gubun , A.url , '' BoardGroupACL, A.USEGROUPFLAG FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.companyid) = '' OR A.companyid IS NULL) AND A.PARENTBOARDID = #v_pRootBoardID# AND A.BoardID <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC
isNotEqual.isNotEqual:
(SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID BoardID , A.BoardName BoardName , CASE WHEN (A.boardname2 = '' OR A.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname2 END BoardName2, CASE WHEN (A.boardname3 = '' OR A.boardname3 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname3 END BoardName3, CASE WHEN (A.boardname4 = '' OR A.boardname4 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname4 END BoardName4, A.TreeViewOrder TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor , A.Gubun , A.url , B.BOARDGROUPACL BOARDGROUPACL, A.USEGROUPFLAG FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A JOIN ( SELECT C.BoardID , C.AccessID , C.Access_ , C.BoardGroupACL , C.tenant_id, C.TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage C LEFT JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo D ON C.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND C.BoardID = D.BoardID WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND C.Access_ = 1 AND C.BoardID <> #v_pExcludeBoardID#
AND (C.AccessID = #v_pUserID# OR C.AccessID = 'guestPermit' ) AND D.ParentBoardID = #v_pRootBoardID#
AND C.BoardGroupACL = 'Y'
) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BOARDID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.companyid) = '' OR A.companyid IS NULL) AND (B.TYPE <> 'GROUP' OR B.TYPE IS NULL) )
UNION
(SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID BoardID , A.BoardName BoardName , CASE WHEN (A.boardname2 = '' OR A.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname2 END BoardName2, CASE WHEN (A.boardname3 = '' OR A.boardname3 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname3 END BoardName3, CASE WHEN (A.boardname4 = '' OR A.boardname4 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname4 END BoardName4, A.TreeViewOrder TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor , A.Gubun , A.url , B.BOARDGROUPACL BOARDGROUPACL, A.USEGROUPFLAG FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A JOIN ( SELECT C.BoardID , C.AccessID , C.Access_ , C.BoardGroupACL , C.tenant_id, C.TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage C LEFT JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo D ON C.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND C.BoardID = D.BoardID
INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST PGL ON C.TENANT_ID = PGL.TENANT_ID AND C.ACCESSID = PGL.GROUP_ID INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO PGI ON PGL.TENANT_ID = PGI.TENANT_ID AND PGL.GROUP_ID = PGI.GROUP_ID
WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND C.Access_ = 1 AND C.BoardID <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND PGI.MEMBER_ID = #v_pUserID# AND D.ParentBoardID = #v_pRootBoardID# AND C.TYPE = 'GROUP'
AND PGI.SUB_DEPT_YN = 'Y'
) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BOARDID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.companyid) = '' OR A.companyid IS NULL) AND B.TYPE = 'GROUP' )
ORDER BY TreeViewOrder ASC

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID , A.BoardName , CASE WHEN (A.Boardname2 = '' OR A.Boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname2 END BoardName2, CASE WHEN (A.Boardname3 = '' OR A.Boardname3 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname3 END BoardName3, CASE WHEN (A.Boardname4 = '' OR A.Boardname4 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname4 END BoardName4, A.TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor, A.Gubun , A.url , '' BoardGroupACL, A.USEGROUPFLAG FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.companyid) = '' OR A.companyid IS NULL) AND A.PARENTBOARDID = #v_pRootBoardID# AND A.BoardID <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC
isNotEqual.isNotEqual:
(SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID , A.BoardName , CASE WHEN (A.Boardname2 = '' OR A.Boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname2 END BoardName2, CASE WHEN (A.Boardname3 = '' OR A.Boardname3 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname3 END BoardName3, CASE WHEN (A.Boardname4 = '' OR A.Boardname4 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname4 END BoardName4, A.TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor, A.Gubun , A.url , '' BoardGroupACL, A.USEGROUPFLAG FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.companyid = #v_COMPANYID#) AND A.PARENTBOARDID = #v_pRootBoardID# AND A.BoardID <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC)
UNION
(SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID , A.BoardName , CASE WHEN (A.Boardname2 = '' OR A.Boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname2 END BoardName2, CASE WHEN (A.Boardname3 = '' OR A.Boardname3 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname3 END BoardName3, CASE WHEN (A.Boardname4 = '' OR A.Boardname4 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname4 END BoardName4, A.TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor, A.Gubun , A.url , '' BoardGroupACL, A.USEGROUPFLAG FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A
JOIN ( SELECT C.BoardID , C.AccessID , C.Access_ , C.BoardGroupACL , C.tenant_id, C.TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage C LEFT JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo D ON C.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND C.BoardID = D.BoardID WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND C.Access_ = 1 AND C.BoardID <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND C.AccessID = #v_pUserID# AND D.ParentBoardID = #v_pRootBoardID#
AND C.BoardGroupACL = 'Y'
) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BOARDID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (TRIM(A.companyid) = '' OR A.companyid IS NULL) AND A.PARENTBOARDID = #v_pRootBoardID# AND A.BoardID <> #v_pExcludeBoardID#
AND (B.TYPE <> 'GROUP' OR B.TYPE IS NULL)
ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC)
UNION
(SELECT DISTINCT AG.BoardID , AG.BoardName , CASE WHEN (AG.Boardname2 = '' OR AG.Boardname2 IS NULL) THEN AG.Boardname ELSE AG.Boardname2 END BoardName2, CASE WHEN (AG.Boardname3 = '' OR AG.Boardname3 IS NULL) THEN AG.Boardname ELSE AG.Boardname3 END BoardName3, CASE WHEN (AG.Boardname4 = '' OR AG.Boardname4 IS NULL) THEN AG.Boardname ELSE AG.Boardname4 END BoardName4, AG.TreeViewOrder , AG.BoardColor BoardColor, AG.Gubun , AG.url , '' BoardGroupACL, AG.USEGROUPFLAG FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo AG
JOIN ( SELECT CG.BoardID , CG.AccessID , CG.Access_ , CG.BoardGroupACL , CG.tenant_id, CG.TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage CG LEFT JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo DG ON CG.TENANT_ID = DG.TENANT_ID AND CG.BoardID = DG.BoardID
INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST PGL ON CG.TENANT_ID = PGL.TENANT_ID AND CG.ACCESSID = PGL.GROUP_ID INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO PGI ON PGL.TENANT_ID = PGI.TENANT_ID AND PGL.GROUP_ID = PGI.GROUP_ID
WHERE CG.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CG.Access_ = 1 AND CG.BoardID <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND PGI.MEMBER_ID = #v_pUserID# AND DG.ParentBoardID = #v_pRootBoardID# AND CG.TYPE = 'GROUP'
AND PGI.SUB_DEPT_YN = 'Y'
) BG ON AG.TENANT_ID = BG.TENANT_ID AND AG.BoardID = BG.BOARDID
WHERE AG.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (TRIM(AG.companyid) = '' OR AG.companyid IS NULL) AND AG.PARENTBOARDID = #v_pRootBoardID# AND AG.BoardID <> #v_pExcludeBoardID#
AND BG.TYPE = 'GROUP'
ORDER BY AG.TreeViewOrder ASC)

sqlMap.select: SELECT 'O' FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT BOARDID , SN , NAME1 , NAME2 , NAME3 , NAME4 , COLNAME , WIDTH , VIEW_FG FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_PBOARDID# )

SELECT BOARDID , SN , NAME1 , NAME2 , NAME3 , NAME4 , COLNAME , WIDTH , VIEW_FG FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_PBOARDID# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

SELECT LISTTYPE , SN , NAME1 , NAME2 , NAME3 , NAME4 , COLNAME , WIDTH , VIEW_FG FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND LISTTYPE = #v_PBOARDTYPE# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN
SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PARENTBOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#

SELECT COUNT(AccessID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardAdmin_FG = 'true' AND (AccessID = #v_pUserID# OR AccessID = #v_pDeptID# OR AccessID = #v_pCompanyID# OR ACCESSID IN ( SELECT AM.DEPTID FROM tbl_usermaster UM INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER AM ON UM.TENANT_ID = AM.TENANT_ID AND UM.CN = AM.CN AND UM.CN = #v_pUserID# AND UM.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_pCompanyID# INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DM ON UM.TENANT_ID = DM.TENANT_ID AND AM.DEPTID = DM.CN AND DM.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_pCompanyID# WHERE UM.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )) AND BoardID = IFNULL((SELECT BoardGroupID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#), #v_pBoardID#)

SELECT IF(BoardAdmin_FG = 'true', 'OK', 'NO') FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND AccessID = #v_pAccessID# AND
BoardID = #v_pBoardID#
BoardID = (SELECT BoardGroupID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#)
AND BoardGroupACL = 'Y'
SELECT PARENTBOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID#
SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #parentBoardID#

select.isEqual:
(SELECT T2.COMPANY , T2.DESCRIPTION , T2.DISPLAYNAME , T2.TITLE , T2.COMPANY2 , T2.DESCRIPTION2 , T2.DISPLAYNAME2 , T2.TITLE2 , T1.ACCESSID , T1.ACCESSNAME , T1.ACCESSNAME2 , T1.BOARDGROUPACL , T2.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME3, T1.BOARDADMIN_FG , T1.ACCESS_ , T1.LISTVIEW_FG , T1.READ_FG , T1.WRITE_FG , T1.REPLY_FG , T1.DELETE_FG , T1.POSTNOTICE, IFNULL(T1.TYPE, '') AS TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage T1 JOIN TBL_USERMASTER T2 ON T1.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID AND T1.ACCESSID = T2.CN WHERE T1.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#)
UNION
(SELECT NULL COMPNAY , NULL DESCRIPTION , DISPLAYNAME , NULL TITLE , NULL COMPANY2 , NULL DESCRIPTION2 , DISPLAYNAME2 , NULL TITLE2 , T1.ACCESSID , T1.ACCESSNAME , T1.ACCESSNAME2 , T1.BOARDGROUPACL , T3.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME3, T1.BOARDADMIN_FG , T1.ACCESS_ , T1.LISTVIEW_FG , T1.READ_FG , T1.WRITE_FG , T1.REPLY_FG , T1.DELETE_FG , T1.POSTNOTICE, IFNULL(T1.TYPE, '') AS TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage T1 JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER T3 ON T1.TENANT_ID = T3.TENANT_ID AND T1.ACCESSID = T3.CN WHERE T1.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#)
UNION
(SELECT NULL COMPNAY , NULL DESCRIPTION , GROUP_NAME AS DISPLAYNAME , NULL TITLE , NULL COMPANY2 , NULL DESCRIPTION2 , GROUP_NAME AS DISPLAYNAME2 , NULL TITLE2 , T1.ACCESSID , T1.ACCESSNAME , T1.ACCESSNAME2 , T1.BOARDGROUPACL , TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.GROUP_NAME DISPLAYNAME3, T1.BOARDADMIN_FG , T1.ACCESS_ , T1.LISTVIEW_FG , T1.READ_FG , T1.WRITE_FG , T1.REPLY_FG , T1.DELETE_FG , T1.POSTNOTICE, T1.TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage T1 JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST ON T1.TENANT_ID = TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.TENANT_ID AND T1.ACCESSID = TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.GROUP_ID WHERE T1.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND T1.TYPE = 'GROUP')
UNION
(SELECT NULL COMPNAY , NULL DESCRIPTION , TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.DISPLAYNAME , NULL TITLE , NULL COMPANY2 , NULL DESCRIPTION2 , TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 , NULL TITLE2 , T1.ACCESSID , T1.ACCESSNAME , T1.ACCESSNAME2 , T1.BOARDGROUPACL , TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME3, T1.BOARDADMIN_FG , T1.ACCESS_ , T1.LISTVIEW_FG , T1.READ_FG , T1.WRITE_FG , T1.REPLY_FG , T1.DELETE_FG , T1.POSTNOTICE, T1.TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage T1 JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER ON T1.TENANT_ID = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TENANT_ID AND T1.ACCESSID = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID WHERE T1.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND (T1.TYPE = 'JIKWI' OR T1.TYPE = 'JIKCHEK') )
select.isNotEqual:
(SELECT T2.COMPANY , T2.DESCRIPTION , T2.DISPLAYNAME , T2.TITLE , T2.COMPANY2 , T2.DESCRIPTION2 , T2.DISPLAYNAME2 , T2.TITLE2 , T1.ACCESSID , T1.ACCESSNAME , T1.ACCESSNAME2 , T1.BOARDGROUPACL , T2.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME3, T1.BOARDADMIN_FG , T1.ACCESS_ , T1.LISTVIEW_FG , T1.READ_FG , T1.WRITE_FG , T1.REPLY_FG , T1.DELETE_FG , T1.POSTNOTICE, IFNULL(T1.TYPE, '') AS TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage T1 INNER JOIN ((SELECT D.CN, D.COMPANY, D.DESCRIPTION, D.DISPLAYNAME, D.TITLE, D.COMPANY2, D.DESCRIPTION2, D.DISPLAYNAME2, D.TITLE2, D.DEPARTMENT as DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.CN, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 as COMPANY, C.DISPLAYNAME as DESCRIPTION, B.DISPLAYNAME, A2.TITLE, C.COMPNM2 as COMPANY2, C.DISPLAYNAME2 as DESCRIPTION2, B.DISPLAYNAME2, A2.TITLE2, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_COMPANYID# WHERE B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME <> #v_COMPANYID#)) T2 ON T1.ACCESSID = T2.CN AND T1.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE T1.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND T2.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY T1.ACCESSID)
UNION
(SELECT NULL COMPNAY , NULL DESCRIPTION , DISPLAYNAME , NULL TITLE , NULL COMPANY2 , NULL DESCRIPTION2 , DISPLAYNAME2 , NULL TITLE2 , T1.ACCESSID , T1.ACCESSNAME , T1.ACCESSNAME2 , T1.BOARDGROUPACL , T3.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME3, T1.BOARDADMIN_FG , T1.ACCESS_ , T1.LISTVIEW_FG , T1.READ_FG , T1.WRITE_FG , T1.REPLY_FG , T1.DELETE_FG , T1.POSTNOTICE, IFNULL(T1.TYPE, '') AS TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage T1 JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER T3 ON T1.TENANT_ID = T3.TENANT_ID AND T1.ACCESSID = T3.CN WHERE T1.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#)
UNION
(SELECT NULL COMPNAY , NULL DESCRIPTION , GROUP_NAME AS DISPLAYNAME , NULL TITLE , NULL COMPANY2 , NULL DESCRIPTION2 , GROUP_NAME AS DISPLAYNAME2 , NULL TITLE2 , T1.ACCESSID , T1.ACCESSNAME , T1.ACCESSNAME2 , T1.BOARDGROUPACL , TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.GROUP_NAME DISPLAYNAME3, T1.BOARDADMIN_FG , T1.ACCESS_ , T1.LISTVIEW_FG , T1.READ_FG , T1.WRITE_FG , T1.REPLY_FG , T1.DELETE_FG , T1.POSTNOTICE, T1.TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage T1 JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST ON T1.TENANT_ID = TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.TENANT_ID AND T1.ACCESSID = TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.GROUP_ID WHERE T1.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.COMPANY_ID = #v_COMPANYID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND T1.TYPE = 'GROUP')
UNION
(SELECT NULL COMPNAY , NULL DESCRIPTION , TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.DISPLAYNAME , NULL TITLE , NULL COMPANY2 , NULL DESCRIPTION2 , TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 , NULL TITLE2 , T1.ACCESSID , T1.ACCESSNAME , T1.ACCESSNAME2 , T1.BOARDGROUPACL , TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME3, T1.BOARDADMIN_FG , T1.ACCESS_ , T1.LISTVIEW_FG , T1.READ_FG , T1.WRITE_FG , T1.REPLY_FG , T1.DELETE_FG , T1.POSTNOTICE, T1.TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage T1 JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER ON T1.TENANT_ID = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TENANT_ID AND T1.ACCESSID = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID WHERE T1.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND (T1.TYPE = 'JIKWI' OR T1.TYPE = 'JIKCHEK') )
select.isEqual:
UNION
(SELECT NULL COMPNAY , NULL DESCRIPTION , ACCESSNAME AS DISPLAYNAME , NULL TITLE , NULL COMPANY2 , NULL DESCRIPTION2 , ACCESSNAME AS DISPLAYNAME2 , NULL TITLE2 , ACCESSID , ACCESSNAME , ACCESSNAME2 , BOARDGROUPACL , ACCESSNAME AS DISPLAYNAME3, BOARDADMIN_FG , ACCESS_ , LISTVIEW_FG , READ_FG , WRITE_FG , REPLY_FG , DELETE_FG , POSTNOTICE, NVL(TYPE, '') AS TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TYPE = 'GUEST' AND ACCESSID = 'guestPermit' AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# )

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_MyTree WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND treeupper = #treeId# AND (TREEBOARDID IN (SELECT I.BOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I WHERE I.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (I.companyid = #companyID# OR TRIM(I.companyid) = '' OR I.companyid IS NULL) ) OR (TRIM(TREEBOARDID) = '' OR TREEBOARDID IS NULL) )

SELECT COUNT(AccessID) FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
AND companyid = #v_COMPANYID#
AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND AccessID = #v_pAccessID#

select.isEqual: SELECT B.BoardID , B.AccessID , B.AccessName , B.AccessName2 , B.AccessLevel , B.Access_ , B.ParentBoardID , B.BoardAdmin_FG , B.ListView_FG , B.Read_FG , B.Write_FG , B.Reply_FG , B.Delete_FG , B.inherit_FG , B.PostNotice , B.BoardGroupACL, B.TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage B JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo A ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND B.BoardID = #v_PBOARDID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT BOARDID , PARENTBOARDID, USEGROUPFLAG FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDTREEPATH LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_PBOARDID#, '%')

sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT appruserid FROM TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.boardid = B.boardid WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND (B.companyid = #companyID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL)

SELECT boardid,
BOARDNAME,
CASE WHEN (BOARDNAME2 = '' OR BOARDNAME2 IS NULL) THEN BOARDNAME ELSE BOARDNAME2 END BOARDNAME,
CASE WHEN (BOARDNAME3 = '' OR BOARDNAME3 IS NULL) THEN BOARDNAME ELSE BOARDNAME3 END BOARDNAME,
CASE WHEN (BOARDNAME4 = '' OR BOARDNAME4 IS NULL) THEN BOARDNAME ELSE BOARDNAME4 END BOARDNAME,
treevieworder, '' as boardcolor, '' as gubun, '' as boardgroupacl FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND (companyID = #companyID#
OR TRIM(companyID) = '' OR companyID IS NULL
) AND parentboardid = #parentBoardID# ORDER BY treevieworder

SELECT boardid, accessid , accessname , accessname2 , accesslevel , access_ , parentboardid , boardadmin_fg , listview_fg , read_fg , write_fg , reply_fg , delete_fg , inherit_fg , postnotice , boardgroupacl, TYPE FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #pBoardID# AND accessid = #userDeptPath#
AND boardgroupacl = 'Y'
LIMIT 1

SELECT backgroundid, orgfilename , savefilename , reguserid , regdate , isuse , sn , width , height FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDBACKGROUNDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND companyid = #companyID#
AND isuse = 1
backgroundid = #backgroundID# ORDER BY sn
SELECT boardid , tablecol , sn , colname1 , colname2 , value , coltype , must FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO_ATTRIBUTE WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID# ORDER BY sn

SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
FORMFLAG = 'Y'
AND FORMLOCATION IS NOT NULL
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'jmocha' AND table_name = 'TBL_Board_MyBoards' AND column_name = 'COMPANYID' )
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_Board_BoardManage ( BOARDID, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, ACCESSNAME2, ACCESSLEVEL, ACCESS_, PARENTBOARDID, BOARDADMIN_FG, LISTVIEW_FG, READ_FG, WRITE_FG, REPLY_FG, DELETE_FG, INHERIT_FG, POSTNOTICE, BOARDGROUPACL, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TYPE ) ( SELECT #v_pBoardID# , ACCESSID , ACCESSNAME , ACCESSNAME2 , ACCESSLEVEL , ACCESS_ , #v_PPARENTBOARDID# , BOARDADMIN_FG , IF(BOARDADMIN_FG = 'true', 'true', LISTVIEW_FG) , IF(BOARDADMIN_FG = 'true', 'true', READ_FG) , IF(BOARDADMIN_FG = 'true', 'true', WRITE_FG) , IF(BOARDADMIN_FG = 'true', 'true', REPLY_FG) , IF(BOARDADMIN_FG = 'true', 'true', DELETE_FG) , INHERIT_FG , POSTNOTICE , BOARDGROUPACL, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, IFNULL(TYPE, '') AS TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage A WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
AND BOARDID = #v_PDEFAULTBOARDID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_Board_BoardManage ( BOARDID, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, ACCESSNAME2, ACCESSLEVEL, ACCESS_, PARENTBOARDID, BOARDADMIN_FG, LISTVIEW_FG, READ_FG, WRITE_FG, REPLY_FG, DELETE_FG, INHERIT_FG, POSTNOTICE, BOARDGROUPACL, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TYPE ) (SELECT #v_pBoardID#, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, ACCESSNAME2, ACCESSLEVEL, ACCESS_, #v_PPARENTBOARDID#, BOARDADMIN_FG, LISTVIEW_FG, READ_FG, WRITE_FG, REPLY_FG, DELETE_FG, INHERIT_FG, POSTNOTICE, BOARDGROUPACL, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, IFNULL(TYPE, '') AS TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage A WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND BOARDID = #v_PDEFAULTBOARDID#
AND ACCESSID IN
#copyListArray[]#
)

INSERT INTO TBL_BOARD_ITEM_LISTOPTION_BOAR( boardid, sn, name1, name2, name3, name4, colname, width, view_fg, tenant_id ) VALUES( #boardID#, #sn#,
'첨부', 'Attachments', '添付', '附加',
'제목', 'Title', '件名', '标题',
'부서', 'Department', '部署', '部门',
'게시자', 'Writer', '作成者', '写作者',
'게시일', 'Registered', '掲示日', '发布日期',
'조회수', 'View', 'ヒット数', '查询数',
#name1#, #name2#, #name3#, #name4#,
#colName#, #width#, #name#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT BOARDTREEPATH FROM tbl_board_boardinfo WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE tbl_board_boardManage SET
ACCESS_ = #v_pAccess#
BOARDGROUPACL = #v_pBoardGroupACL#
WHERE boardid IN ( SELECT boardid FROM tbl_board_boardinfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND boardtreepath LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_pBoardID#, '%') OR boardid = #v_pBoardID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ACCESSID = #v_pAccessID#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_board_boardmanage ( BOARDID, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, ACCESSNAME2, ACCESS_, PARENTBOARDID, BOARDADMIN_FG, LISTVIEW_FG, READ_FG, WRITE_FG, REPLY_FG, DELETE_FG, INHERIT_FG, POSTNOTICE, BOARDGROUPACL, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TYPE ) SELECT BOARDID, #v_pAccessID#, #v_pAccessName#, #v_pAccessName2#, #v_pAccess#, PARENTBOARDID, 'false', 'false', 'false', 'false', 'false', 'false', 'false', 'false', #v_pBoardGroupACL#, #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID#, #v_pType# FROM tbl_board_boardinfo WHERE
BOARDID IN
#v_upperBoadList[]#
AND
TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
ACCESS_ = #v_pAccess#
BOARDGROUPACL = #v_pBoardGroupACL#

insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_Board_MyBoards ( USERID, BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, BOARDNAME3, BOARDNAME4, TREEVIEWNUM, VIEWORDER, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #v_PUSERID# USERID , BOARDID , BOARDNAME , BOARDNAME2 , BOARDNAME3 , BOARDNAME4 , ( SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) + 1 FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# ), ( SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(VIEWORDER) IS NULL THEN 2 ELSE MAX(VIEWORDER) + 1 END FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# ), TENANT_ID, '*' as COMPANYID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# )
insert.isNotEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_Board_MyBoards ( USERID, BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, BOARDNAME3, BOARDNAME4, TREEVIEWNUM, VIEWORDER, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #v_PUSERID# USERID , BOARDID , BOARDNAME , BOARDNAME2 , BOARDNAME3 , BOARDNAME4 , ( SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) + 1 FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# ), ( SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(VIEWORDER) IS NULL THEN 2 ELSE MAX(VIEWORDER) + 1 END FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# ), TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# )

sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_Board_BoardManage( BOARDID, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, ACCESSNAME2, ACCESSLEVEL, ACCESS_, PARENTBOARDID, BOARDADMIN_FG, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TYPE )
SELECT #v_BOARDGROUPID#, 'Top', DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, 1, 1, 'top', 'false', #v_TENANTID#, 'Top', 'DEPT' FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = 'Top' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
VALUES ( #v_BOARDGROUPID#, #v_ACCESSID#, #v_ACCESSNAME#, #v_ACCESSNAME2#, 1, 1, 'top', 'true', #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID#, 'PERSON' )

INSERT INTO TBL_Board_BoardManage ( BOARDID, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, ACCESSNAME2, ACCESSLEVEL, ACCESS_, PARENTBOARDID, BOARDADMIN_FG, LISTVIEW_FG, READ_FG, WRITE_FG, REPLY_FG, DELETE_FG, INHERIT_FG, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TYPE )
SELECT #v_BOARDID#, 'Top', DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, 1, 1, #v_PARENTBOARDID#, 'false', 'true', 'true', 'true', 'true', 'true', 'true', #v_TENANTID#, 'Top', 'DEPT' FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = 'Top' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
VALUES ( #v_BOARDID#, #v_ACCESSID#, #v_ACCESSNAME#, #v_ACCESSNAME2#, 1, 1, #v_PARENTBOARDID#, 'true', 'true', 'true', 'true', 'true', 'true', 'true', #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID#, #v_TYPE# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_MyTree SET TREENAME = #treeName#, TREENAME2 = #treeName2#, TREENAME3 = #treeName3#, TREENAME4 = #treeName4# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TREEID = #treeUpper# AND USERID = #userId#

UPDATE TBL_Board_MyTree SET TREEUPPER = #moveTreeID#, TREESTEP = ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT COUNT(TREENAME) + 1 FROM TBL_Board_MyTree A WHERE TREEUPPER = #moveTreeID# AND USERID = #userId# ) AA ) WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TREEID = #selTreeID# AND USERID = #userId#
UPDATE TBL_Board_BoardInfo SET BOARDTREEPATH = #boardTreePath# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_BoardInfo SET TreeViewOrder = #v_count# WHERE tenant_id = #v_tenantID# AND BoardID = #v_boardID#

UPDATE TBL_Board_BoardBackGroundInfo SET
ORGFILENAME = #v_ORGFILENAME#,
SAVEFILENAME = #v_SAVEFILENAME#,
WIDTH = #v_WIDTH#, HEIGHT = #v_HEIGHT# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BACKGROUNDID = #v_BACKGROUNDID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_BoardInfo SET ParentBoardID = #v_pNewParentBoardID#, BoardGroupID = #v_pNewBoardGroupID# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pOrgBoardID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_BoardManage SET ParentBoardID = #v_pNewParentBoardID# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pOrgBoardID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_Board_BoardInfo SET BOARDNAME = #v_PBOARDNAME#, BOARDNAME2 = #v_PBOARDNAME2#, BOARDNAME3 = #v_PBOARDNAME3#, BOARDNAME4 = #v_PBOARDNAME4# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
update.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_Board_BoardInfo SET BOARDDESCRIPTION = #v_PDESCRIPTION#, ITEMEXPIRES = #v_PEXPIRES#, ATTACHSIZELIMIT = #v_PATTACHMAX#, URL = #v_PURL#, REPLYNOTIFY = #v_PREPLYNOTIFY#, GUBUN = (CASE WHEN (#v_PGUBUN# IS NULL OR #v_PGUBUN# = '') THEN 0 ELSE #v_PGUBUN# END) , BOARDNAME = #v_PBOARDNAME#, DELETEAFTER = #v_PDELETEAFTER#, BOARDCOLOR = #v_PBOARDCOLOR#, BOARDNAME2 = #v_PBOARDNAME2#, BOARDNAME3 = #v_PBOARDNAME3#, BOARDNAME4 = #v_PBOARDNAME4#, PORTLET = #v_PPORTLET#, ONELINEREPLY = #v_PONELINEREPLY#, BACKGROUND = #v_PBACKGROUND#, FORMFLAG = #v_PFORM#, APPRFLAG = #v_PAPPRFLAG#, DISLIKEFLAG = #v_DISLIKEFLAG#, APPRMAILFLAG = #v_PAPPRMAILFLAG#, LIKEFLAG = #v_LIKEFLAG#, MAILFG_POST = #v_MAILFG_POST#, MAILFG_MOD = #v_MAILFG_MOD#, MAILFG_COMMENT = #v_MAILFG_COMMENT#, REACTFLAG = #v_REACTFLAG#, USEKEYWORD = #v_USEKEYWORD#, ATTACHMENTFLAG = #v_ATTACHMENTFLAG#, PUBLICFLAG = #v_PUBLICFLAG#, ALLNEWBOARDFLAG = #v_ALLNEWBOARDFLAG#, WRITERFLAG = #v_WRITERFLAG#, STARRATINGFLAG = #v_STARRATINGFLAG#, VERSIONMANAGE = #versionManage#, LISTSHOWTYPE = #v_LISTSHOWTYPE#, URLCOPYFLAG = #v_URLCOPYFLAG#, USEGROUPFLAG = #v_USEGROUPFLAG# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_MyBoards SET BOARDNAME = #v_PBOARDNAME#, BOARDNAME2 = #v_PBOARDNAME2#, BOARDNAME3 = #v_PBOARDNAME3#, BOARDNAME4 = #v_PBOARDNAME4# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#

UPDATE TBL_Board_MyTree SET TREENAME = #v_PBOARDNAME#, TREENAME2 = #v_PBOARDNAME2#, TREENAME3 = #v_PBOARDNAME3#, TREENAME4 = #v_PBOARDNAME4# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TREEBOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#

UPDATE TBL_Board_BoardManage SET inherit_FG = #v_pInherit#, BoardAdmin_FG = #v_pAdmin#, ACCESS_ = #v_pAccess#, ListView_FG = #v_pListView#, Read_FG = #v_pRead#, Write_FG = #v_pWrite#, Reply_FG = #v_pReply#, Delete_FG = #v_pDelete#, PostNotice = #v_pPostNotice#, BoardGroupACL = #v_pBoardGroupACL# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
AND companyid = #v_COMPANYID#
AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND AccessID = #v_pAccessID#

UPDATE TBL_Board_BoardManage SET BOARDID = #v_pBoardID#, ACCESSID = #v_pAccessID#, ACCESSNAME = #v_PACCESSNAME#, ACCESSNAME2 = #v_PACCESSNAME2#,
ACCESSLEVEL = NULL,
ACCESSLEVEL = #v_PACCESSLEVEL#,
ACCESS_ = #v_PACCESS#, PARENTBOARDID = #v_PPARENTBOARDID#, BOARDADMIN_FG = #v_PBOARDADMIN_FG#, LISTVIEW_FG = #v_PLISTVIEW_FG#, READ_FG = #v_PREAD_FG#, WRITE_FG = #v_PWRITE_FG#, REPLY_FG = #v_PREPLY_FG#, DELETE_FG = #v_PDELETE_FG#, INHERIT_FG = #v_PINHERIT_FG#, POSTNOTICE = #v_PPOSTNOTICE#, BOARDGROUPACL = #v_PBOARDGROUPACL#, TYPE = #v_TYPE# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
AND ACCESSID = #v_pAccessID# AND BOARDID = #v_pBoardID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'N' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
update.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = NULL WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_BoardInfo SET FORMLOCATION = #v_PFORMLOCATION# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
UPDATE TBL_BOARD_BOARDBACKGROUNDINFO SET isuse = #isUse# sn = #isUse# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND backgroundid = #backgroundID#
UPDATE TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO SET attributeyn = #value# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_ApprList WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#
DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDBACKGROUNDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND backgroundid = #backgroundID#
DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO_ATTRIBUTE WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID#
DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_LISTOPTION_BOAR WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID#
TRUNCATE TBL_BOARD_TREECACHE
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND companyID = #v_COMPANYID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND AccessID = #v_pAccessID#

DELETE FROM tbl_board_boardManage WHERE boardid IN ( SELECT boardid FROM tbl_board_boardinfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND boardtreepath LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_pBoardID#, '%') OR boardid = #v_pBoardID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ACCESSID = #v_pAccessID#

DELETE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#
AND ACCESSID IN
#copyListArray[]#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_MyTree WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TREEID = #treeId#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_TreeCache WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND QUERY = #v_PQUERY#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO SET BOARDTREEPATH = #v_BOARDTREEPATH# WHERE BOARDID = #v_BOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_board_boardmanage ( BOARDID, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, ACCESSNAME2, ACCESS_, PARENTBOARDID, BOARDADMIN_FG, LISTVIEW_FG, READ_FG, WRITE_FG, REPLY_FG, DELETE_FG, INHERIT_FG, POSTNOTICE, BOARDGROUPACL, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TYPE ) SELECT #v_BOARDID#, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, ACCESSNAME2, '1', #v_PARENTBOARDID#, 'false', 'false', 'false', 'false', 'false', 'false', 'false', 'false', #v_BOARDGROUPACL#, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TYPE FROM tbl_board_boardmanage WHERE BOARDID = #v_ORGBOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ACCESSID = #v_ACCESSID# ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ACCESS_ = '1'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO SET BOARDGROUPID = #v_NEWBOARDGROUPID# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_NOTICEBOARD WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_BOARD_NOTICEBOARD (BOARDID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (#v_PBOARDID#, #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_TABBOARD WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(COMPANYID) = '' OR COMPANYID IS NULL) AND TABID = #v_TABID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_BOARD_TABBOARD (TABID, BOARDID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2) VALUES (#v_TABID#, #v_PBOARDID#, #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID#, #v_BOARDNAME#, #v_BOARDNAME2#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_TABBOARD WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TABID = #v_TABID#
DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_TABBOARD WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT FORMFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_MyTree WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TREEBOARDID = #boardID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_BOARDITEM_SCRAP WHERE BOARDID = #boardID#
DELETE FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONTLIST WHERE BOARDID = #boardID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT A.ITEMID ITEMID, A.ITEMID PARENTITEMID, '0.0' VERSION, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITEDATE, A.TENANT_ID TENANTID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY B ON A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE BOARDID = #boardId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND B.ITEMID IS NULL

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, B.BOARDNAME, B.BOARDNAME2, B.BOARDNAME3, B.BOARDNAME4, CAST(B.GUBUN AS CHAR) AS GUBUN, A.WRITERID, A.TITLE, CAST(A.TENANT_ID AS CHAR) AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.NTENDDATE LIKE CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d'), '%')
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_Board_BoardManage ( BOARDID, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, ACCESSNAME2, ACCESSLEVEL, ACCESS_, PARENTBOARDID, BOARDADMIN_FG, LISTVIEW_FG, READ_FG, WRITE_FG, REPLY_FG, DELETE_FG, INHERIT_FG, POSTNOTICE, BOARDGROUPACL, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID , TYPE ) VALUES ( #boardID#, 'guestPermit', '비회원', '비회원', NULL, 1, #parentBoardID#, 'false', 'true', 'true', 'false', 'false', 'false', 'false', 'false', 'N', #tenantID#, #companyID#, 'GUEST' )
